export class ATMOpenParser{constructor(){this._username='';this._cash=0;this._bank=0;}flush(){this._username='';this._cash=0;this._bank=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Must match the order from ATMOpenComposer.java
this._username=wrapper.readString();// 1️⃣ username
this._cash=wrapper.readInt();// 2️⃣ on-hand credits
this._bank=wrapper.readInt();// 3️⃣ bank credits
return true;}get username(){return this._username;}get cash(){return this._cash;}get bank(){return this._bank;}}
